Stateful Controls

Controls need visible states. The user should know what is possible, what just happened, and what needs attention.

React state sketch

type SaveState = "idle" | "saving" | "saved" | "error";

function SaveButton({ state }: { state: SaveState }) {
  return (
    <button disabled={state === "saving"} aria-live="polite">
      {state === "saving" ? "Saving" : "Save"}
    </button>
  );
}

Review prompt

For every interactive control, ask: default, hover, focus, active, disabled, loading, error?
